lesson.menu_desc: Running International Supply Chain Meetings -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 5 -- The Vendor Call -- Running International Supply Chain Meetings
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fabiana Michelly Silva | Aula 5 -- The Vendor Call

listenings.text: Hi Fabiana, this is Klaus. I am sending over the agenda for tomorrow's vendor call so nothing is missed. Three points must be covered. First, the SLA needs to be renegotiated, because our delivery targets keep being missed. Second, the latest consignment was rerouted through Rotterdam after a strike, and a surcharge was added to the freight, so that has to be explained. Third, a new tariff is being applied at customs, which means the quote will have to be revised. Before the call, I will have the numbers checked by our finance team, and I am getting the contract reviewed by legal as we speak. If anything is still unclear, it can be raised during the call. Please make sure each action item is assigned to an owner, so the order can be fulfilled on time. Talk soon.

Hi team, here is a quick summary of the vendor call with TechFlow. Overall, it went well. The SLA was renegotiated, and stricter delivery targets have now been agreed. The delayed consignment was rerouted through Rotterdam, and although a surcharge was added, the goods are being expedited and should clear customs by Friday. We also learned that a new tariff is being applied, so a revised quote will be sent to us next week. I have had the new numbers checked by finance, and I am getting the updated contract reviewed by legal. Every action item from the call was assigned to an owner, and the full agenda was covered. The bottom line is simple: the order will be fulfilled on time. I will share the summary shortly. Let me know if anything needs to be added.

extra_audio.text: Klaus sends Fabiana the agenda for the vendor call. The SLA is renegotiated and stricter delivery targets are agreed. The delayed consignment is rerouted and expedited through customs. A revised quote is prepared after a new tariff is applied. Every action item is assigned, so the order is fulfilled on time.
